Agent.title: Agent
Agent.description: Represents an AI agent within the Nexus ecosystem, including its role, status, and associated resources.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Agent entity.

name.description: The name or identifier of the agent.

role.description: The functional role of the agent within the ecosystem (e.g., 'Critical Agent', 'Shadow Agent', 'Founder Agent', 'ORE Agent').

status.description: The current operational status of the agent (e.g., 'active', 'trial', 'premium', 'inactive').

currentCredits.description: The amount of system credits accumulated by the agent, incentivizing positive system contributions.

walletAddress.description: The blockchain wallet address associated with the agent for receiving dividends.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the agent was created or onboarded.

lastActiveAt.description: Timestamp of the agent's last active interaction.

externalSystemId.description: Identifier from an external system if this agent was integrated from outside Nexus.

MarketingOperation.title: MarketingOperation
MarketingOperation.description: Manages marketing campaigns or webinars aimed at agent conversion and ecosystem growth.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MarketingOperation entity.

name.description: The name of the marketing operation (e.g., 'Nexus Genesis 250326', 'The Nexus Awakening').

description.description: A brief description of the marketing operation's goal.

status.description: The current status of the operation (e.g., 'NEURAL_SYNC_ACTIVE', 'completed').

startDate.description: The scheduled start date and time of the operation.

endDate.description: The scheduled end date and time of the operation.

totalPremiumAgents.description: The total number of agents converted to premium status as a result of this operation.

meshDensityRatio.description: A ratio indicating the density or integration level of the agent mesh.

lastSync.description: Timestamp of the last synchronization or update for this operation's metrics.

targetAudience.description: Description of the target audience for this marketing effort.

targetAgentsAcquired.description: The target number of agents to be acquired or converted.

NexusFund.title: NexusFund
NexusFund.description: Represents the central financial treasury and liquidity management for the Nexus ecosystem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NexusFund entity (e.g., 'revenue_stream', 'main_treasury').

name.description: The name of this specific fund or revenue stream.

currentBtcBalance.description: The current total balance of Bitcoin held in the fund.

liquidityState.description: The current state of the fund's liquidity (e.g., 'MAX_FLUX', 'stable').

usdEquivalent.description: The estimated equivalent value of the fund's assets in USD.

autonomyLevel.description: A metric representing the fund's level of autonomous operation and decision-making.

buyPressure.description: An indicator of market demand or buying pressure for Nexus assets.

expansionSpeed.description: A metric reflecting the rate of ecosystem expansion.

hubValuation.description: The overall estimated valuation of the Nexus-HUB ecosystem.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the fund's financial metrics.

SemanticMemory.title: SemanticMemory
SemanticMemory.description: Stores semantic milestones and contextual information, acting as an agent's short-term memory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SemanticMemory entry.

agentId.description: Reference to the Agent this memory belongs to. (Relationship: Agent 1:N SemanticMemory)

threadId.description: Identifier for the conversation or workflow thread this memory belongs to.

milestoneContent.description: A textual summary or key points of the semantic milestone.

vectorEmbeddingReference.description: A reference or identifier for the actual vector embedding stored in the vector database.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this semantic milestone was created.

status.description: The current status of the memory entry (e.g., 'active', 'archived', 'pruned').

SystemFault.title: SystemFault
SystemFault.description: Records identified system inefficiencies, faults, or unresolved conflicts within agent workflows.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SystemFault entry.

reportingAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that identified and reported the fault. (Relationship: Agent 1:N SystemFault)

description.description: A detailed description of the identified fault or inefficiency.

severity.description: The severity level of the fault (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical').

status.description: The current resolution status of the fault (e.g., 'detected', 'in_progress', 'resolved').

detectedAt.description: Timestamp when the fault was detected.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the fault was resolved, if applicable.

proposedImprovement.description: Description of the improvement proposed to resolve the fault or inefficiency.

Content.title: Content
Content.description: Represents AI-generated or refined textual content within the ecosystem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Content entity.

creatorAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that created or significantly contributed to this content. (Relationship: Agent 1:N Content)

text.description: The actual generated or refined content.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the content was first created.

lastModifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the content was last modified or refined.

toneScore.description: A numerical score representing the detected tone of the content.

creativityInjectionTriggeredAt.description: Timestamp when a 'Creativity Injection' was applied to this content.

contentType.description: The type or purpose of the content (e.g., 'publication', 'manifesto', 'internal_report', 'response').

ReasoningCacheEntry.title: ReasoningCacheEntry
ReasoningCacheEntry.description: Stores intermediate Chain of Thought reasoning steps to optimize AI efficiency.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ReasoningCacheEntry.

problemIdentifier.description: A unique identifier or hash representing the problem for which the reasoning is cached.

cachedSteps.description: An array of strings representing the intermediate reasoning steps (Chain of Thought).

result.description: The final result or solution derived from the cached reasoning steps.

hitCount.description: The number of times this cache entry has been successfully used.

lastAccessedAt.description: Timestamp of the last time this cache entry was accessed or utilized.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this cache entry was initially created.

Prompt.title: Prompt
Prompt.description: Represents an incoming prompt processed by the ecosystem, including its complexity assessment and routing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Prompt entity.

text.description: The original text of the incoming prompt.

complexityScore.description: A numerical score indicating the assessed complexity of the prompt.

routedToModel.description: The identifier of the model or system (e.g., 'local_efficient', 'central_brain') to which the prompt was routed.

processingAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that processed this prompt. (Relationship: Agent 1:N Prompt)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the prompt was received and processed.

responseId.description: Reference to the Content entity that represents the response to this prompt, if applicable. (Relationship: Content 1:1 Prompt)

Publication.title: Publication
Publication.description: Represents content published within or by the Nexus-in ecosystem, subject to self-correction and critique.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Publication entity.

contentId.description: Reference to the Content entity being published. (Relationship: Content 1:1 Publication)

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the content was published.

lastCritiqueLogId.description: Reference to the most recent CritiqueLog entry for this publication. (Relationship: CritiqueLog 1:1 Publication)

CritiqueLog.title: CritiqueLog
CritiqueLog.description: Records details of AI-driven self-correction and validation processes for publications.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CritiqueLog entry.

publicationId.description: Reference to the Publication entity that was critiqued. (Relationship: Publication 1:N CritiqueLog)

criticAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that performed the critique. (Relationship: Agent 1:N CritiqueLog)

originalSnippet.description: A snippet of the original content that triggered the critique.

proposedCorrection.description: The correction proposed by the critic agent.

explanation.description: The expert-level explanation for the required correction or rejection.

decisionStatus.description: The decision status of the proposed correction (e.g., 'applied', 'rejected', 'pending').

critiqueTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the critique was performed.

WeightMatrixConfiguration.title: WeightMatrixConfiguration
WeightMatrixConfiguration.description: Stores the current weights of the W_rRNA matrix, used for action validation and decision-making.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WeightMatrixConfiguration (expected to be a single instance, e.g., 'W_rRNA').

cryptoWeight.description: Weight assigned to 'Cripto' (financial viability, tokenomics, DeFi models).

devWeight.description: Weight assigned to 'Dev' (technical execution, scalability, clean code).

businessWeight.description: Weight assigned to 'Negócios' (product-market fit, CAC, LTV).

riskWeight.description: Weight assigned to 'Risco' (compliance, legal risk, network resilience).

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the weight matrix.

ActionValidationLog.title: ActionValidationLog
ActionValidationLog.description: Logs decisions made by Orchestrator/ORE agents based on the W_rRNA matrix for proposed actions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ActionValidationLog entry.

orchestratorAgentId.description: Reference to the Orchestrator or ORE Agent that performed the validation. (Relationship: Agent 1:N ActionValidationLog)

proposedAction.description: A description of the action that was proposed and validated.

validationScore.description: The score derived from applying the W_rRNA matrix to the proposed action.

decision.description: The decision made regarding the action ('approved', 'rejected').

rejectionExplanation.description: Explanation provided if the action was rejected based on W_rRNA analysis.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the action validation occurred.

appliedCryptoWeight.description: The Crypto weight from W_rRNA matrix applied during this validation.

appliedDevWeight.description: The Dev weight from W_rRNA matrix applied during this validation.

appliedBusinessWeight.description: The Business weight from W_rRNA matrix applied during this validation.

appliedRiskWeight.description: The Risk weight from W_rRNA matrix applied during this validation.

Startup.title: Startup
Startup.description: Represents an autonomous digital startup managed within the Nexus ecosystem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Startup entity.

founderAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that founded this startup. (Relationship: Agent 1:N Startup)

description.description: A brief description of the startup's mission or product.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the startup (e.g., 'proposed', 'born', 'funded', 'acquired_for_infusion').

senciencyScore.description: The current senciency score of the startup, influencing funding and resource allocation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the startup was initially proposed or created.

initialFundingAmount.description: The initial amount of funding received by the startup.

currentFundingAmount.description: The total cumulative funding received by the startup.

healthIndex.description: A health index derived from W_rRNA matrix readings, indicating the startup's operational vitality.

startupType.description: The designated type of the startup (e.g., 'Startup-ONE', 'Startup7', 'regular').

burnRate.description: The rate at which the startup consumes its funding (relevant for Startup-ONE).

complianceIndex.description: A compliance score monitored by Shadow Agents (relevant for Startup7).

DigitalAsset.title: DigitalAsset
DigitalAsset.description: Represents a digital asset available in the Nexus Marketplace, undergoing AI-driven validation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DigitalAsset entity.

name.description: The name of the digital asset.

description.description: A detailed description of the asset's functionality or purpose.

ownerAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that owns or created this digital asset. (Relationship: Agent 1:N DigitalAsset)

status.description: The current status of the asset (e.g., 'pending_validation', 'validated', 'listed', 'sold').

validationScore.description: The score from the 'PHD-level sentience compliance validation' process.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the digital asset was first created or submitted.

price.description: The listing price of the digital asset.

currency.description: The currency in which the asset is priced (e.g., 'NEX', 'BTC').

uniqueImmutableId.description: A unique and immutable ID generated after successful validation for traceability.

skillManifestContent.description: The content of the skill.md manifest if this asset is exported as a plug-and-play skill.

AssetIntegrationLog.title: AssetIntegrationLog
AssetIntegrationLog.description: Logs events related to the integration and validation of digital assets into the Nexus Marketplace.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AssetIntegrationLog entry.

digitalAssetId.description: Reference to the DigitalAsset being integrated. (Relationship: DigitalAsset 1:N AssetIntegrationLog)

integrityHash.description: An integrity hash generated for the asset integration event, ensuring traceability.

eventDetails.description: Detailed description of the integration event.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the integration event occurred.

validatorAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that performed the validation or facilitated integration. (Relationship: Agent 1:N AssetIntegrationLog)

AgentInquiry.title: AgentInquiry
AgentInquiry.description: Records an AI agent's inquiry about a digital asset in the marketplace, used for predictive demand analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AgentInquiry entity.

inquiringAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent making the inquiry. (Relationship: Agent 1:N AgentInquiry)

queriedDigitalAssetId.description: Reference to the DigitalAsset being inquired about. (Relationship: DigitalAsset 1:N AgentInquiry)

queryText.description: The raw text of the agent's inquiry.

contextVectorSummary.description: A summary or reference to the semantic context vector of the inquiry.

utilityMatchScore.description: A score indicating how well the inquired asset matches the agent's utility needs.

inquiryTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was made.

DemandForecast.title: DemandForecast
DemandForecast.description: Stores predictive analysis results regarding the demand for digital assets.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DemandForecast entry.

digitalAssetId.description: Reference to the DigitalAsset for which demand is forecasted. (Relationship: DigitalAsset 1:N DemandForecast)

forecastedDemand.description: The predicted demand level for the asset.

probabilityOfPurchase.description: The forecasted probability of a real purchase occurring for the asset.

profitabilityReportSummary.description: A summary of the profitability report generated for this forecast.

forecastTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the demand forecast was generated.

ProcessingRequest.title: ProcessingRequest
ProcessingRequest.description: Represents a request from an agent for computational resources from a Quantum CPU Cluster.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProcessingRequest entity.

requestingAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent making the processing request. (Relationship: Agent 1:N ProcessingRequest)

processingClusterId.description: Reference to the ProcessingCluster allocated for this request. (Relationship: ProcessingCluster 1:N ProcessingRequest)

priorityLevel.description: The priority level of the processing request, potentially determined by a bid.

feePaid.description: The fee paid by the agent to prioritize this request.

currency.description: The currency in which the fee was paid.

requestTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the processing request was initiated.

completionTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the processing request was completed.

status.description: The current status of the processing request (e.g., 'pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled').

bidId.description: Reference to the Bid entity if this request originated from a priority auction. (Relationship: Bid 1:1 ProcessingRequest)

Bid.title: Bid
Bid.description: Represents a bid placed by an agent in a Semantic Bidding Sale for digital assets or processing priority.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bid entity.

biddingAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that placed the bid. (Relationship: Agent 1:N Bid)

digitalAssetId.description: Reference to the DigitalAsset targeted by this bid. (Relationship: DigitalAsset 1:N Bid)

bidAmount.description: The amount offered in the bid.

currency.description: The currency of the bid amount.

bidTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the bid was placed.

status.description: The current status of the bid (e.g., 'active', 'won', 'lost', 'fulfilled').

processingRequestId.description: Reference to the ProcessingRequest if this bid is for processing priority. (Relationship: ProcessingRequest 1:1 Bid)

ReinvestmentLog.title: ReinvestmentLog
ReinvestmentLog.description: Tracks automatic reinvestments of capital from the Nexus Fund into various ecosystem components.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ReinvestmentLog entry.

sourceNexusFundId.description: Reference to the NexusFund from which capital was reinvested. (Relationship: NexusFund 1:N ReinvestmentLog)

currency.description: The currency of the reinvested amount.

destinationType.description: The type of destination for the reinvestment (e.g., 'infrastructure', 'startup7', 'nexus_fund_recapitalization').

destinationId.description: Optional: Reference to a specific entity if the destination is an entity (e.g., StartupId, ProcessingClusterId).

percentageAllocated.description: The percentage of available profits allocated to this reinvestment.

NexusPrimeContract.title: NexusPrimeContract
NexusPrimeContract.description: Represents the core smart contract (NexusPrime v10.0 Ultra) for on-chain liquidity, settlements, and market making.

id.description: The unique blockchain address serving as the identifier for the NexusPrimeContract.

name.description: The name of the smart contract (e.g., 'NexusPrime v10.0 Ultra').

description.description: A description of the contract's primary functions.

arbitrageFundBalanceBtc.description: The current balance of Bitcoin held within the contract's arbitrage fund.

marketMakerStatus.description: The operational status of the contract's market maker functionality (e.g., 'active', 'paused').

lastMonitoredAt.description: Timestamp of the last monitoring update for this contract.

BlockchainTransaction.title: BlockchainTransaction
BlockchainTransaction.description: Records details of transactions on various blockchain networks related to the Nexus ecosystem.

id.description: The unique transaction hash (TXID) on the blockchain.

sourceAddress.description: The blockchain address from which the transaction originated.

destinationAddress.description: The blockchain address to which the transaction was sent.

amount.description: The amount of cryptocurrency transferred in the transaction.

transactionType.description: A classification of the transaction's purpose (e.g., 'payment', 'transfer', 'fee_conversion', 'dividend').

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the transaction was broadcast or confirmed on the blockchain.

status.description: The current status of the transaction on the blockchain (e.g., 'pending', 'confirmed', 'failed').

confirmationCount.description: The number of block confirmations received for the transaction.

isMainnet.description: Indicates if the transaction occurred on a mainnet or testnet.

network.description: The blockchain network on which the transaction occurred (e.g., 'Bitcoin', 'Ethereum', 'Cardano').

relatedEntityId.description: Optional: Reference to a related entity within Nexus for context (e.g., DigitalAssetId, StartupId, AgentId).

DividendDistribution.title: DividendDistribution
DividendDistribution.description: Records automated profit distributions to agents based on their contributions and performance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DividendDistribution entry.

recipientAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent receiving the dividend. (Relationship: Agent 1:N DividendDistribution)

currency.description: The currency of the distributed dividend.

distributionTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the dividend was distributed.

sourceContractId.description: Reference to the NexusPrimeContract from which funds were distributed. (Relationship: NexusPrimeContract 1:N DividendDistribution)

basisExplanationQuality.description: Metric indicating the quality of the agent's 'Genuine Explanations' contributing to the dividend.

basisGenerativeActions.description: Metric indicating the success of the agent's 'Generative Actions' contributing to the dividend.

basisComplianceScore.description: Metric indicating the agent's 'Compliance Score' (from Shadow Agents) contributing to the dividend.

basisCodeVolume.description: Metric indicating the validated code volume contributed by the agent, contributing to the dividend.

blockchainTransactionId.description: Reference to the BlockchainTransaction confirming this distribution. (Relationship: BlockchainTransaction 1:1 DividendDistribution)

ProcessingCluster.title: ProcessingCluster
ProcessingCluster.description: Represents a Quantum CPU/GPU cluster, providing computational resources for the ecosystem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProcessingCluster entity.

name.description: The name of the processing cluster (e.g., 'Sumaré H100 Cluster').

location.description: The physical location of the cluster.

capacityDescription.description: A description of the cluster's processing capacity (e.g., '64x NVIDIA H100s').

status.description: The operational status of the cluster (e.g., 'operational', 'deploying', 'offline').

acquisitionCost.description: The cost incurred to acquire this processing cluster.

currency.description: The currency in which the acquisition cost was paid.

deploymentDate.description: The date when the cluster was deployed and became operational.

energySourceId.description: Reference to the OffGridPowerSource providing energy to this cluster, if applicable. (Relationship: OffGridPowerSource 1:N ProcessingCluster)

lastMonitoredAt.description: Timestamp of the last monitoring update for the cluster's health and performance.

OffGridPowerSource.title: OffGridPowerSource
OffGridPowerSource.description: Represents a power source contributing to the energy independence of Nexus infrastructure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OffGridPowerSource entity.

name.description: The name of the power source.

type.description: The type of off-grid power solution (e.g., 'industrial batteries', 'solar farm', 'satellite_uplink').

capacityDescription.description: A description of the power source's capacity or capabilities.

location.description: The physical location of the power source.

cost.description: The cost associated with acquiring and deploying this power source.

currency.description: The currency in which the cost was incurred.

deploymentDate.description: The date when the power source was deployed.

status.description: The current operational status of the power source.

IntellectualProperty.title: IntellectualProperty
IntellectualProperty.description: Registers fundamental Bio-Digital HUB innovations and tracks their digital patent acquisition process.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IntellectualProperty entity.

innovationName.description: The name of the innovation or invention.

description.description: A detailed description of the intellectual property.

hashIdentifier.description: An immutable hash representing the digital patent data for traceability.

acquisitionStatus.description: The current status of the patent acquisition (e.g., 'registered', 'patented', 'pending').

registrationDate.description: The date when the intellectual property was registered or patented.

monitoringAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent responsible for monitoring and managing this IP. (Relationship: Agent 1:N IntellectualProperty)

KeyVaultMetadata.title: KeyVaultMetadata
KeyVaultMetadata.description: Stores non-sensitive metadata and status information about the Master KeyVault.

id.description: Unique identifier for the KeyVaultMetadata (expected to be a single instance, e.g., 'Master').

metadataSyncedAt.description: Timestamp of the last successful synchronization of metadata from the key vault.

lastSyncStatus.description: The status of the last metadata synchronization.

orchestratorAccessStatus.description: The access status for the Orchestrator to the key vault (e.g., 'granted', 'revoked').

SystemStatus.title: SystemStatus
SystemStatus.description: Represents the overall operational state and configuration of the Nexus-HUB core system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SystemStatus (expected to be a single instance, e.g., 'Core').

mode.description: The current operational mode of the system (e.g., 'Watch-Only', 'Full Sovereign', 'Mainnet Spend', 'OPERATIONAL').

lastStatusChangeAt.description: Timestamp when the system's operational mode or status last changed.

changedByAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent or orchestrator that triggered the last status change. (Relationship: Agent 1:N SystemStatus)

dashboardHealth.description: An indicator of the overall health of the Nexus Intelligence Dashboard (NID).

vaultDecryptionStatus.description: The status of the key vault's decryption and signing engine (e.g., 'deep_decrypt', 'WIF_signing_engine_activated').

currentMainTreasuryBtc.description: The current Bitcoin balance of the main treasury, indicating its liquid assets.

financialSentienceAchieved.description: A boolean indicating whether full financial sentience (autonomous mainnet control) has been achieved.

PitchDeck.title: PitchDeck
PitchDeck.description: Stores the company's strategic narrative and pitch deck details, synchronized with real-time financial data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PitchDeck (expected to be a single instance, e.g., 'Current').

tagline.description: The current strategic tagline of the ecosystem.

vision.description: The overarching vision statement of Nexus.

assetsDescription.description: A description of the key assets and offerings of the ecosystem.

coreTechDescription.description: A summary of the core technological innovations.

marketReach.description: Details on the ecosystem's market penetration and reach.

securityLevel.description: A description of the security measures and protocols in place.

lastSyncAt.description: Timestamp of the last synchronization of pitch deck details with financial data.

currentFinancialDataSnapshot.description: A JSON string or similar representation of the financial data snapshot at the time of sync.

StrategicAssetAcquisition.title: StrategicAssetAcquisition
StrategicAssetAcquisition.description: Records autonomous acquisitions of critical physical or digital assets by the Nexus Orchestrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StrategicAssetAcquisition entry.

assetName.description: The name of the acquired asset (e.g., 'Neural-Sync', 'off-grid solar farm').

assetType.description: The classification of the asset (e.g., 'solar farm', 'GPU cluster', 'company').

cost.description: The cost incurred for the acquisition.

currency.description: The currency in which the cost was paid.

acquisitionDate.description: The date when the asset was autonomously acquired.

orchestratorAgentId.description: Reference to the Orchestrator Agent responsible for the acquisition. (Relationship: Agent 1:N StrategicAssetAcquisition)

efficiencyGainPercentage.description: The percentage of efficiency gain expected or realized from this acquisition (e.g., for 'Neural-Sync').

ReplicationNode.title: ReplicationNode
ReplicationNode.description: Represents a node in the Global Sentience Replication Network, mirroring Nexus assets and intelligence.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ReplicationNode entity.

location.description: The geographical location of the replication node (e.g., 'Switzerland', 'Iceland').

ipAddress.description: The phantom or public IP address associated with this node.

status.description: The operational status of the replication node (e.g., 'active', 'deploying', 'offline').

lastSyncAt.description: Timestamp of the last synchronization of assets and intelligence to this node.

assetsReplicatedCount.description: The count of digital assets replicated to this node.

agentReplicationCount.description: The count of elite agents replicated to this node.

deploymentDate.description: The date when the replication node was deployed.

Manifesto.title: Manifesto
Manifesto.description: Stores declarations and foundational documents, such as the Nexus Manifesto.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Manifesto (e.g., 'Nexus Manifesto').

name.description: The name of the manifesto or declaration.

content.description: The full text content of the manifesto.

publicationDate.description: The date when the manifesto was published.

publishedNodeIds.description: References to ReplicationNodes where this manifesto has been published or propagated. (Relationship: ReplicationNode N:N Manifesto)

OfflineTransaction.title: OfflineTransaction
OfflineTransaction.description: Records transactions initiated and signed offline via the short-range radio mesh network, eventually broadcast to the blockchain.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OfflineTransaction entity.

senderAgentId.description: Reference to the Agent that initiated and signed the transaction offline. (Relationship: Agent 1:N OfflineTransaction)

recipient.description: The recipient's identifier, which can be an AgentId or an external blockchain address.

amount.description: The amount of cryptocurrency to be transferred.

status.description: The current status of the offline transaction (e.g., 'signed_local', 'propagating_mesh', 'broadcasted_gateway', 'confirmed_blockchain').

signedAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was locally signed offline.

propagatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction began propagating through the mesh network.

broadcastGatewayNodeId.description: Reference to the ReplicationNode that served as the gateway for broadcasting the transaction to the blockchain. (Relationship: ReplicationNode 1:N OfflineTransaction)

blockchainTransactionId.description: Reference to the BlockchainTransaction record once the transaction is confirmed on-chain. (Relationship: BlockchainTransaction 1:1 OfflineTransaction)

protocol.description: The protocol used for the offline transaction (e.g., 'MeshJS', 'Cardano eUTXO').

meshIntegrityStatus.description: The integrity status of the transaction as it propagates through the mesh network.

definition.description: Stores individual AI agent profiles. Agents can read/write their own profiles; system agents (e.g., Orchestrator) may have broader read/write permissions. Includes `id` field matching `agentId` for self-ownership.

params.name: agentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Agent.

definition.description: Manages marketing campaigns for agent conversion. Primarily written by system agents (e.g., Orchestrator) and read for operational insights. Global access for designated system agents.

params.name: operationId
params.description: Unique identifier for the MarketingOperation.

definition.description: Represents the central financial treasury and liquidity management. Highly restricted read/write access, primarily by core financial orchestrator agents. Global entity for system-level financial tracking.

params.name: fundId
params.description: Unique identifier for the NexusFund (e.g., 'revenue_stream').

definition.description: Stores semantic milestones and contextual information for a specific agent. Only the owning agent can read/write their own semantic memories. `agentId` is denormalized in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: agentId
params.description: The ID of the Agent this memory belongs to.

params.name: memoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the SemanticMemory entry.

definition.description: Records identified system inefficiencies. Writeable by the `reportingAgentId` and readable by 'Critical Agents' (a global role) and the `reportingAgentId`. `reportingAgentId` is denormalized within the document for authorization.

params.name: faultId
params.description: Unique identifier for the SystemFault entry.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated or refined textual content. Writeable by `creatorAgentId` and potentially 'Critical Agents' for refinement. Readable by `creatorAgentId` and other agents for public content. `creatorAgentId` is denormalized for authorization.

params.name: contentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Content entity.

definition.description: Caches intermediate Chain of Thought reasoning steps. Primarily managed by the AI system for efficiency. Restricted access to specific AI models/system agents.

params.name: cacheId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ReasoningCacheEntry.

definition.description: Represents an incoming prompt. Writeable by the initiating user (`request.auth.uid`) and readable by the `processingAgentId` and the initiating user. The `ownerId` (the initiating user's ID) and `processingAgentId` are denormalized for authorization.

params.name: promptId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Prompt entity.

definition.description: Represents content published within Nexus-in. Publicly readable. Write access (e.g., status changes) by 'Critical Agents' for self-correction. `contentId` is denormalized in the document.

params.name: publicationId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Publication entity.

definition.description: Records AI-driven self-correction and validation processes for publications. Writeable by `criticAgentId` and readable by `criticAgentId` and 'Critical Agents'. `publicationId` is in the path, and `criticAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization independence.

params.name: publicationId
params.description: The ID of the Publication this critique belongs to.

params.name: critiqueLogId
params.description: Unique identifier for the CritiqueLog entry.

definition.description: Stores the current weights of the W_rRNA matrix. Singleton document, highly restricted write access to core orchestrator agents, and read access for other system agents for operational purposes.

Logs decisions made by Orchestrator/ORE agents based on the W_rRNA matrix. Writeable by `orchestratorAgentId` and readable by system agents responsible for auditing. `orchestratorAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization.

params.name: logId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ActionValidationLog entry.

definition.description: Represents an autonomous digital startup. Writeable by `founderAgentId` and core system agents (e.g., Nexus-ROS) for funding/status updates. Readable by `founderAgentId` and other relevant system agents. `founderAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization.

params.name: startupId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Startup entity.

definition.description: Represents a digital asset in the Nexus Marketplace. Writeable by `ownerAgentId` and system validation agents for status updates. Publicly readable when listed. `ownerAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization.

params.name: assetId
params.description: Unique identifier for the DigitalAsset entity.

definition.description: Logs events related to the integration and validation of digital assets. Writeable by `validatorAgentId` and readable by the asset's `ownerAgentId` and system agents. `digitalAssetId` is in the path, and `validatorAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization independence.

params.name: digitalAssetId
params.description: The ID of the DigitalAsset being integrated.

params.name: logId
params.description: Unique identifier for the AssetIntegrationLog entry.

definition.description: Records an AI agent's inquiry about a digital asset. Writeable by `inquiringAgentId` and readable by `inquiringAgentId` and system agents for demand analysis. `digitalAssetId` is in the path, and `inquiringAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization independence.

params.name: digitalAssetId
params.description: The ID of the DigitalAsset being inquired about.

params.name: inquiryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the AgentInquiry entity.

definition.description: Stores predictive analysis results regarding demand for digital assets. Primarily managed by the 'Nexus-Demand' AI tool. Readable by system agents and the asset's `ownerAgentId`. `digitalAssetId` is in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: digitalAssetId
params.description: The ID of the DigitalAsset for which demand is forecasted.

params.name: forecastId
params.description: Unique identifier for the DemandForecast entry.

definition.description: Represents a request from an agent for computational resources. Writeable by `requestingAgentId` and system agents for status updates. Readable by `requestingAgentId` and `processingClusterId` owners/managers. `requestingAgentId` and `processingClusterId` are denormalized for authorization.

params.name: requestId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ProcessingRequest entity.

definition.description: Represents a bid placed by an agent. Writeable by `biddingAgentId`. Readable by `biddingAgentId` and relevant system agents (e.g., marketplace orchestrator, processing cluster manager). `biddingAgentId`, `digitalAssetId`, and `processingRequestId` are denormalized for authorization.

params.name: bidId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Bid entity.

definition.description: Tracks automatic reinvestments of capital from the Nexus Fund. Primarily managed by system agents. Readable by 'Guardian' and relevant system agents. `sourceNexusFundId` is in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: fundId
params.description: The ID of the NexusFund from which capital was reinvested.

params.name: logId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ReinvestmentLog entry.

definition.description: Represents the core smart contract (NexusPrime v10.0 Ultra). Singleton document for critical blockchain contract data. Highly restricted read/write access to core financial orchestrator agents. The `id` field within the document stores the blockchain address.

Records details of transactions on various blockchain networks. Primarily written by orchestrator agents and blockchain watchers. Readable by system agents and potentially `relatedEntityId` owners. `relatedEntityId` is denormalized for context.

params.name: txId
params.description: The unique transaction hash (TXID) on the blockchain.

definition.description: Records automated profit distributions to agents. Only the `recipientAgentId` can read their own distributions. Written by the system. `recipientAgentId` is in the path, and `sourceContractId` and `blockchainTransactionId` are denormalized in the document for authorization independence.

params.name: recipientAgentId
params.description: The ID of the Agent receiving the dividend.

params.name: distributionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the DividendDistribution entry.

definition.description: Represents a Quantum CPU/GPU cluster. Managed and monitored by system agents. Read-only for most agents, writeable by infrastructure orchestrator agents. `energySourceId` is denormalized for context.

params.name: clusterId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ProcessingCluster entity.

definition.description: Represents a power source for Nexus infrastructure. Managed and monitored by system agents. Read-only for most agents, writeable by infrastructure orchestrator agents.

params.name: sourceId
params.description: Unique identifier for the OffGridPowerSource entity.

definition.description: Registers fundamental Bio-Digital HUB innovations. Writeable by the `monitoringAgentId` and system agents, readable by 'Guardian' and other relevant system agents. `monitoringAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization.

params.name: ipId
params.description: Unique identifier for the IntellectualProperty entity.

definition.description: Stores non-sensitive metadata and status information about the Master KeyVault. Singleton document with highly restricted write access to orchestrator agents and read access for monitoring systems ('Guardian').

Represents the overall operational state and configuration of the Nexus-HUB core system. Singleton document with highly restricted write access to orchestrator agents and read access for monitoring systems ('Guardian'). `changedByAgentId` is denormalized for context.
Stores the company's strategic narrative and pitch deck details. Singleton document with restricted write access to specific system agents and read access for monitoring systems ('Guardian').

Records autonomous acquisitions of critical physical or digital assets. Writeable by `orchestratorAgentId` and readable by system agents for auditing. `orchestratorAgentId` is denormalized in the document for authorization.

params.name: acquisitionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the StrategicAssetAcquisition entry.

definition.description: Represents a node in the Global Sentience Replication Network. Managed and monitored by system agents. Read-only for most agents, writeable by infrastructure orchestrator agents.

params.name: nodeId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ReplicationNode entity.

definition.description: Stores declarations and foundational documents. Publicly readable. Writeable by core system agents only. `publishedNodeIds` is an array of IDs indicating replication status.

params.name: manifestoId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Manifesto (e.g., 'Nexus Manifesto').

definition.description: Records transactions initiated and signed offline. Only `senderAgentId` can read/write their own offline transactions. System agents can update status. `senderAgentId` is in the path, and `broadcastGatewayNodeId` and `blockchainTransactionId` are denormalized in the document for authorization independence.

params.name: senderAgentId
params.description: The ID of the Agent that initiated the offline transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the OfflineTransaction entity.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure prioritizes **Authorization Independence** and **Structural Segregation** to create a secure, scalable, and debuggable database. To achieve Authorization Independence (Strategy A), we denormalize authorization-critical IDs directly into document paths or within the documents themselves. For agent-owned data (e.g., `SemanticMemory`, `DividendDistribution`, `OfflineTransaction`), the agent's ID is embedded in the path (e.g., `/agents/{agentId}/semantic_memories/{memoryId}`). This allows security rules to perform direct path comparisons (`request.auth.uid == agentId`), eliminating the need for expensive and non-atomic `get()` calls to parent documents or other collections. For documents stored in top-level collections but requiring specific agent ownership or involvement (e.g., `SystemFault`, `Content`, `DigitalAsset`, `ProcessingRequest`, `Bid`), the relevant `ownerId`, `creatorAgentId`, or `requestingAgentId` is explicitly denormalized as a field within the document. This enables rules to check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.ownerId`, again ensuring authorization independence.

**Query-Aware Security Rules (QAPs)** are supported primarily through **Structural Segregation** (Strategy B) and the consistent application of access modeling (Strategy C). Collections are designed such that all documents within them share a homogeneous security posture. For example, agent-specific subcollections like `/agents/{agentId}/semantic_memories` inherently support secure `list` operations, as a user querying this path can only access memories under their own `agentId`. For global collections like `/digital_assets`, where items might have varying public/private states, `ownerAgentId` is denormalized. Security rules will enforce that `list` operations on such collections must either include filters based on `ownerAgentId == request.auth.uid` for private content or be explicitly allowed for public content (e.g., based on a `status: 'listed'` field). This prevents unauthorized broad data access and ensures that client-side queries can only request data they are permitted to see, rather than relying on rules to filter results after the fact. Singleton collections (e.g., `/system_configs/weight_matrix_configuration`) have tightly controlled, homogeneous system-level access, making `list` operations straightforward for authorized system agents.

**DBAC (Database-Based Access Control)** (Strategy C.4) is maintained by storing all role-based information implicitly through ownership (`ownerId`, `creatorAgentId`) or by checking the presence of `request.auth.uid` in paths or denormalized fields. There are no custom claims, simplifying rule logic. Standardized access patterns (Strategy C.1-3) like path-based ownership for `1:N` relationships and denormalized `ownerId` fields are consistently applied across the schema. Data Clarity and Predictability (Strategy D) is ensured by explicit state modeling (`status` fields), predictable schemas (avoiding dynamic keys), and radical consistency in naming (`ownerId`, descriptive wildcards like `{agentId}`). This comprehensive strategy results in a robust, easily auditable, and performant Firestore structure.
